description: prepare-save-request.ts calls deps.clockNow() on the EmptyNoteDiscarded path (line 33), consuming Clock I/O even when no save occurs. REQ-016 confines Clock.now() to Step 1, but the semantic intent is to support the save pipeline. On the empty-idle path, this timestamp is used only for EmptyNoteDiscarded.occurredOn. Meanwhile, PROP-014 ('Clock.now called exactly once') passes because the pipeline test only covers the happy path. There is no pipeline-level test for Clock.now call count on the empty-idle path. If the empty-idle path is reached in pipeline, clockNow is called once (in prepareSaveRequest), but beginAutoSave/dispatchSaveRequest are skipped, so this is technically compliant. However, the test coverage gap means PROP-014 is only verified for one code path.
